prompt: Ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial portrait of a distinguished mature masculine gentleman with a powerful, refined presence. Sharp jawline, wearing round black sunglasses with a stoic expression while looking confidently off-camera. Dressed in an impeccably tailored cream double-breasted luxury suit layered over a navy paisley-pattern waistcoat, crisp white dress shirt, navy striped silk tie with a gold tie bar, matching pocket square, and French cuffs. Hands adorned with multiple luxury statement rings, wearing a premium black leather-strap wristwatch. Holding an ornate gold serpent-head walking cane with intricate sculptural detailing. Standing inside an opulent vintage library filled with dark mahogany bookshelves, antique leather armchairs, brass candle holders, warm table lamps, and classic European gentleman's club. Warm amber cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, shallow depth of field, premium editorial color grading, elegant old-money aesthetic, aristocratic luxury, timeless sophistication, hyper-detailed textures, photorealistic skin, extremely sharp focus, medium portrait, 85mm lens, f/1.8, HDR, ultra-detailed, masterpiece, Vogue, GQ, Hasselblad medium-format photography, 8K.
